Table DCS_USER

Card of table DCS_USER

Name

DCS_USER

Code

DCS_USER

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_USER

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_IDENTITY" schema

called "DCS_USER".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

Consider the data type for Implementation -

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_USER_KEY based on (USER_ID, VALID_FROM, MARKET_CODE)

 

 

4. Use "UPDATED_DATE___TIME" to set up record validity to maintain history (VALID_FROM, VALID_TO) .

 

 

5. Save the table definition.

 

6. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

7. The data in the atrget object must deduplicated.

 

8. Verify whether the newcoming ingested records in the source already exist in the Presentation Layer with any previous load, based on the

Unique Record Identifier.

i. If Yes, don't propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

ii. If No, propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

 

 

9. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

10. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_USER

CKT_DCS_USER


Server validation rule of the table DCS_USER

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_USER

drop table DCS_USER cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_USER
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER (
DCS_USER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_CASE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_BALANCE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DCS_BALANCE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_DEVICE_KEY TEXT not null,
USER_ID TEXT not null,
COMPANY_ID INTEGER,
DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY TEXT not null,
DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY TEXT not null,
USEREMAIL TEXT,
LOGIN TEXT,
USERTYPE TEXT,
USERGROUPS TEXT,
STATUS TEXT,
LAST_LOGIN DATE,
FIRST_NAME TEXT,
LAST_NAME TEXT,
USER_NAME TEXT,
DATE_OF_BIRTH DATE,
COMPANY TEXT,
FAX TEXT,
PHONE TEXT,
WEB_SITE TEXT,
TAX_EXEMPT TEXT,
GENDER TEXT,
ACCEPTANCE_ON_NOTIFICATION TEXT,
REGISTRATION_DATE DATE,
LANGUAGE TEXT,
BILLING_FIRST_NAME TEXT,
BILLING_LAST_NAME TEXT,
BILLING_ADDRESS TEXT,
BILLING_ADDRESS_LINE_3 TEXT,
BILLING_CITY TEXT,
BILLING_STATE TEXT,
BILLING_COUNTRY TEXT,
BILLING_ZIPCODE TEXT,
BILLING_PHONE TEXT,
SHIPPING_FIRST_NAME TEXT,
SHIPPING_LAST_NAME TEXT,
SHIPPING_ADDRESS TEXT,
SHIPPING_ADDRESS_LINE_3 TEXT,
SHIPPING_CITY TEXT,
SHIPPING_STATE TEXT,
SHIPPING_COUNTRY TEXT,
SHIPPING_ZIPCODE TEXT,
SHIPPING_PHONE TEXT,
STORE TEXT,
RETAILER_TYPE TEXT,
POS_NUMBER TEXT,
MARKETING_RESEARCH TEXT,
CONSUMER_TYPE TEXT,
CONSUMER_SOURCE TEXT,
TOUCHPOINT_NAME TEXT,
HOSTESS_ID TEXT,
HOSTESS_FIRSTNAME TEXT,
HOSTESS_LASTNAME TEXT,
POS TEXT,
HOSTESS_CATEGORY TEXT,
CATEGORY TEXT,
PROFILE_STATUS TEXT,
UPDATED_DATE_TIME DATE not null,
REFERENCE TEXT,
USER_ID_USED_FOR_ACS_SYSTEM TEXT,
USER_DEREGISTRATION_DATE TEXT,
DOCUMENT_NUMBER TEXT,
DOCUMENT_TYPE TEXT,
QUANTITY_CIGARETTES TEXT,
SPICE_ID TEXT,
PRIMARY_BRAND_FEATURE TEXT,
PRIMARY_BRAND_VARIANT TEXT,
DCS_ID TEXT,
FIRST_LOGIN DATE,
NUMBER_VISITS INTEGER,
NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_YEAR INTEGER,
NUMBER_VISITS_LAST_3_MONTHS INTEGER,
NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_MONTH INTEGER,
NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_WEEK INTEGER,
NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_TODAY INTEGER,
MEMBER_TYPE TEXT,
RETAILER_ID TEXT,
EXPERT_NAME TEXT,
EXPERT_DESC TEXT,
TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS TEXT,
OPTIN_TOKEN TEXT,
IQOS_EMAIL_OPT_IN TEXT,
IQOS_PHONE_OPT_IN TEXT,
IQOS_SMS_OPT_IN TEXT,
CIVILITY TEXT,
REGISTRATION_RETAILER_POS TEXT,
PERSONALIZED_COMMUNICATION TEXT,
PERSONALIZED_EXPERIENCE TEXT,
HOSTESS_POS TEXT,
PROFILE_COMPLETED TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_USER primary key (DCS_USER_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_USER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_CASE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_BALANCE_KEY is
'Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_DCS_BALANCE_KEY is
'Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_DEVICE_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USER_ID is
'User identifier. ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.COMPANY_ID is
'Store / Company identifier';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USEREMAIL is
'Email of user';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.LOGIN is
'Customer login email (unique identifier for ACS connection) ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USERTYPE is
'It can be consumer, retailer, admin';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USERGROUPS is
'Contains all user groups associated to one consumer';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.STATUS is
'Order status code identifier (values vary per market):';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.LAST_LOGIN is
'Date time (local) of user last login at Iqos store';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.FIRST_NAME is
'First name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.LAST_NAME is
'Last name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USER_NAME is
'Customer name (concatenation from first and last name)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DATE_OF_BIRTH is
'Customer date of birth';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.COMPANY is
'Store/company name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.FAX is
'Customer FAX';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PHONE is
'Phone Number';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.WEB_SITE is
'Customer website - not in use';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.TAX_EXEMPT is
'Is order tax exempt (Y/N)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.GENDER is
'Customer gender (3 - female, 4 - male)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.ACCEPTANCE_ON_NOTIFICATION is
'Customer acceptance in receiving notifications (Y/N)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.REGISTRATION_DATE is
'Date of the registration';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.LANGUAGE is
'Customer  language';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_FIRST_NAME is
'Customer  billing address - first name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_LAST_NAME is
'Customer  billing address - last name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_ADDRESS is
'Customer  billing address - address line 1';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_ADDRESS_LINE_3 is
'Customer  billing address - address line 2 ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_CITY is
'Customer billing address - city';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_STATE is
'Customer billing address - state/province';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_COUNTRY is
'Customer  billing address - country';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_ZIPCODE is
'Customer  billing address - zipcode';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.BILLING_PHONE is
'Phone Number';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_FIRST_NAME is
'Customer  shipping address - first name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_LAST_NAME is
'Customer  shipping address - last name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_ADDRESS is
'Customer  shipping address - address line 1';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_ADDRESS_LINE_3 is
'Customer shipping address - address line 2';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_CITY is
'City of shipping city';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_STATE is
'State of shipping adress';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_COUNTRY is
'Customer shipping address - country';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_ZIPCODE is
'Zipcode of shipping address';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SHIPPING_PHONE is
'Consumer phone of shipping address';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.STORE is
'Submarket/company identifier ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.RETAILER_TYPE is
'Retailer type identifier';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.POS_NUMBER is
'Store location identifier (identifies store location if customer registered in store)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.MARKETING_RESEARCH is
'Customer acceptance in receiving communication and publicity (Y/N)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.CONSUMER_TYPE is
'Old field related to the connection with SPICE, no longer in use';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.CONSUMER_SOURCE is
'Consumer source value to be filled when the consumer is created via checkout - originally for Netherlands';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.TOUCHPOINT_NAME is
'If customer registered through hostess form - store location name, a.e "IQOS Boutique Calgary"';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.HOSTESS_ID is
'Hostess identifier';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.HOSTESS_FIRSTNAME is
'First name of hostess';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.HOSTESS_LASTNAME is
'Last name of hostess';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.POS is
'If customer registered through hostess form - Store location name - code';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.HOSTESS_CATEGORY is
'Used in the past for reporting of Hostess activities';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.CATEGORY is
'Same as above';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PROFILE_STATUS is
'Profile status - "active" or "inactive", based on last update';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.UPDATED_DATE_TIME is
'Local date time when profile was last updated';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.REFERENCE is
'Refers to an old configuration that is no longer in use.';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USER_ID_USED_FOR_ACS_SYSTEM is
'Customer login email';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.USER_DEREGISTRATION_DATE is
'Date time (local) of consumer deregistration';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DOCUMENT_NUMBER is
'Customer identification document number';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DOCUMENT_TYPE is
'Customer identification document type';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.QUANTITY_CIGARETTES is
'Tobacco Preferences - Quantity of cigarettes smoked daily';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.SPICE_ID is
'External identifier for the consumer on a 3rd party system. Originally contained Spice id';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PRIMARY_BRAND_FEATURE is
'Tobacco Preferences - Main smoked brand';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PRIMARY_BRAND_VARIANT is
'Tobacco Preferences - Main smoked variant';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.DCS_ID is
'Sequencial number user identifier for communication with ACS ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.FIRST_LOGIN is
'Local date time - Customer first login';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits ';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_YEAR is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current year';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS_LAST_3_MONTHS is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in last 3 months';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_MONTH is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current month';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_WEEK is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current week';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.NUMBER_VISITS_THIS_TODAY is
'Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current day';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.MEMBER_TYPE is
'Customer member type (10 - Age non verified; 20 - Age verified)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.RETAILER_ID is
'DCS user unique identifier that placed the order - Backend user (when order is placed through retailer)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.EXPERT_NAME is
'Name of Expert that was registered when consumer selected "Informed by IQOS expert".';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.EXPERT_DESC is
'Name of the field that is presented on the front-end to select the Expert name';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS is
'Customer acceptance of terms and conditions (Y/N)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.OPTIN_TOKEN is
'Customer acceptance to receive communication token';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.IQOS_EMAIL_OPT_IN is
'Customer acceptance to receive communication through email';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.IQOS_PHONE_OPT_IN is
'Customer acceptance to receive communication through phone';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.IQOS_SMS_OPT_IN is
'Customer acceptance to receive communication through sms';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.CIVILITY is
'Customer civil state (1 - single, 2 - married)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.REGISTRATION_RETAILER_POS is
'Customer registration store location';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PERSONALIZED_COMMUNICATION is
'Customer acceptance in receiving iqos club program communication (true/false)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PERSONALIZED_EXPERIENCE is
'Customer acceptance on iqos club program terms and conditions (true/false)';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.HOSTESS_POS is
'If customer registered through hostess form, saves store pos code';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.PROFILE_COMPLETED is
'Timestamp (UTC) that marks indicates when the profile was completed, based on update of email, password and required fields. Created for Portugal';

comment on column PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R11_USER__DCS_CASE foreign key (DCS_CASE_KEY)
references PL_CARE.DCS_CASE (DCS_CASE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R12_USERP_DCS_PROF foreign key (DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY)
references PL_PROFILING.DCS_PROFILEFIELD (DCS_PROFILEFIELD_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R36_USER__DCS_REFE foreign key (DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY)
references PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER (DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R37_USER__DCS_TOUC foreign key (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
references PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R38_USER__DCS_BALA foreign key (DCS_BALANCE_KEY)
references PL_PROGRAM.DCS_BALANCE (DCS_BALANCE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R40_USER__DCS_BALA foreign key (DCS_DCS_BALANCE_KEY)
references PL_PROGRAM.DCS_BALANCE (DCS_BALANCE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R41_USER__DCS_REFE foreign key (DCS_DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY)
references PL_PROGRAM.DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER (DCS_REFERRALCODEPERGODFATHER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R43_USER__DCS_CODE foreign key (DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY)
references PL_MARKETING.DCS_CODEUSAGE (DCS_CODEUSAGE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R46_USER__DCS_DEVI foreign key (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_DEVICE (DCS_DEVICE_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R49_USER__DCS_SEAS foreign key (DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY)
references PL_INTERACTION.DCS_SEASURVEY (DCS_SEASURVEY_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_IDENTITY.DCS_USER
add constraint FK_DCS_USER_R5_USER_T_DCS_TOUC foreign key (COMPANY_ID)
references PL_RETAILLOCATION.DCS_TOUCHPOINT (DCS_TOUCHPOINT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
